documents.ap_policy:
ACCOUNTS PAYABLE POLICY

Section 1: Invoice Approval
1.1 Invoices matching PO amount within 2% tolerance shall be approved.
1.2 Invoices with quantity discrepancies > 5% require hold and vendor contact.
1.3 Invoices from inactive vendors must be escalated.
1.4 Duplicate invoices (same vendor, amount, date within 30 days) must be rejected.

Section 2: Three-Way Match
2.1 All invoices must be matched against PO and GRN before approval.
2.2 Partial receipts require hold until full delivery confirmed.

Section 3: Early Payment
3.1 Invoices with early-payment discount terms may be approved early if discount > 1%.
